title: Illumina Inc. (ILMN) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: DCF analysis for Illumina Inc. utilizing a 10-year FCF projection modeling to assess intrinsic fair value versus market price.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: Estimated at 5-6% for the near-to-medium term, reflecting normalized post-pandemic growth rates and the actual 0.05 revenue growth metric printed during exploration.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: Estimated at 2.0%, standard assumption for a mature market leader operating in the healthcare and life sciences tools sector.
assumptions.discountRate: Estimated at 12.0%, a higher-than-average discount rate reflecting the company's relatively high beta of 1.503 and recent regulatory/legal uncertainties.
